home.subtitle: Fullstack Software Developer
home.tagline: I build software across the full stack, with a strong passion for open source and the Linux world. From the JVM to the browser, from backend to infrastructure.
about.title: About
about.bio: I'm Gabriele, a fullstack software developer based in northern Italy, near Bergamo. I have experience building enterprise applications and ERP systems. I work across the full stack — from Java/Spring Boot backends to Angular frontends, down to infrastructure with Docker, Kubernetes, and Linux environments. Passionate about open source and the Linux world, I always look for elegant and scalable solutions.

experience.empty: Nothing here yet. Check back soon!
experience.work.skyblockpuro.description: Founded the Minecraft server SkyBlockPuro. Responsible for the entire technical infrastructure: DDoS protection, proxy management, version updates, custom Java plugin development, and coordination of external contributors.
experience.work.r1se.description: Developed backend software for internal company utilities. Set up the initial cloud infrastructure on AWS using EC2 instances.
experience.work.sandrini.description: Backend development of an ERP management system using Java and Spring Boot. ERP frontend development with Angular and TypeScript. CI/CD pipeline implementation. Development of an integrative ERP mobile app with Flutter (Android). PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MariaDB, and Redis database management. Hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and Proxmox.
experience.work.metamc.description: Developed Java plugins for Minecraft servers handling 150+ concurrent active players. Responsible for server infrastructure management and development team supervision.
experience.work.devroom.description: Commission-based work for the devroom team: mod development, server configurations, and custom plugins.
experience.work.songoda.description: Translated Songoda's Minecraft plugins from English to Italian.
experience.work.techscode.description: Translated TechsCode's Minecraft plugins from English to Italian.

projects.tcp-proxy.description: Configurable TCP proxy written in Rust using the Tokio async runtime, designed to handle multiple concurrent connections efficiently.
